arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray reveals Josh Maja transfer near miss as West Brom striker dilemma nears
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray is looking forward to working with West Bromwich Albion forward Josh Maja in due course - having revealed that he came oh so close to recruiting him previously in his managerial career. Mowbray has been a fan of Maja for a while, certainly pre-dating this, his second spell in charge of the club, and he revealed that, while at Blackburn Rovers, he came close to signing him.
